questionHtml:
Carbon sinks are any reservoirs that absorb and store carbon dioxide from the atmosphere. Which process increases the size of the carbon sink in oceans?

A.  Photosynthesis

B.  Respiration

C.  Ocean acidification

D.  Decomposition
